description: A comprehensive development container template for OpenCode-powered projects with development tools pre-configured and ready to use with Spec-Driven Development and Ralph Loops.

name: Typo3
description: A template to support remote development with TYPO3.

phpVersion.description: Select the PHP version to use in the development container. You may choose PHP version from 8.2 to 8.5.

webserver.description: Which webserver do you prefer? Currently only FrankenPHP is supported, but more options will be added in the future.
